title: Remag's Compressed Cobblestone
body:
Ever wanted to carry a few googol cobblestone in one block? well this is the mod for you.

I shouldn't really have to explain too much as its self explanatory but this mod adds compressed cobblestone, from single to Quinhectuple compressed (105x)

I may continue this mod as adding just one more cobblestone would make that cobblestone need over 100 googol cobblestone to craft but as of 2.0 105x is the max
